name: shippath-usda-enrichment
title: ShipPath USDA Enrichment Actor
description: Joins USDA MPI directory + demographic data, tags every record with hub/freight/census region, writes to Google Sheets Master Warehouse tab.

googleSheetsId.title: Google Sheets ID
googleSheetsId.description: The ID from your Google Sheet URL (between /d/ and /edit)

googleServiceAccountJson.title: Google Service Account JSON
googleServiceAccountJson.description: Full JSON contents of your Google service account credentials. Store this as an Apify secret.

stateFilter.title: State Filter (optional)
stateFilter.description: 2-letter state code to filter results (e.g. CA, TX). Leave blank to process all states.
